title: Här är de hetaste onoterade bolagen nu
summary_md:
# Här är de hetaste onoterade bolagen nu

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-06-23  
**Market Sentiment**: Positive

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

This episode focuses on the unlisted (pre-IPO) equity market in Sweden, featuring Cici Nilsson from the private-share trading platform Equor. The discussion covers how unlisted trading works, why the IPO window has been quiet (strong private capital markets reducing the need to list), expectations of a stronger IPO autumn, and high-profile private names like SpaceX and Anthropic. The standout is Blykalla, a pre-revenue nuclear-energy company that is Equor's most-traded stock in 2026, up ~75% since its autumn round.

---

## Recommendations

_No signals for universe stocks in this episode._
